  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Open stud bays at floor transitions lack required fireblocking, allowing a continuous vertical path for fire and smoke."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking materials, such as 2-inch nominal lumber, two layers of 1-inch nominal lumber, or 3/4-inch structural wood panels, to seal the open stud bays at the floor-to-wall transitions."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under IRC Section R302.11, fireblocking must be provided in concealed spaces of stud walls and partitions, including at all interconnections between vertical and horizontal spaces such as floor-to-wall transitions. Leaving these bays open at the transition fails to meet the prescriptive code requirements.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R302.11"
  ]
}
